prayers.text:
Iláhī Iláhī ijma` qulūba aḥibbā'ika `alā al-Ittiḥādi wa-aẓhir lahum `ināyataka al-`uẓmā wa-j`alhum yattabi`ūna awāmiraka wa-yaḥfaẓūna sharī`atak.

a`in-hum yā Iláhī fī sa`yihim wa-hab lahum min ladunka quwwatan `alā khidmati amrika wa-lā tatruk-hum yā Iláhī li-anfusihim.

anir lahum khuṭuwātahum bi-nūri ma`rifatika wa-shraḥ ṣudūrahum bi-maḥabbatika. innaka anta ilāhahum wa-mu`īnahum

Bismi Allāhi al-aqdasi al-amnaʻi al-aʻazzi al-ʻaliyyi al-aʻlā

Subḥānaka Allāhumma Yā Ilāhī hadhihi ayyāmun fīhā faraḍta aṣ-ṣiyāma li-kulli al-anāmi liyuzakkā bihā anfusahum wa-yanqaṭiʻunna ʻammā

az.cat: Atəş Lövhü, Əhməd Lövhü, Müqəddəs Dənizçi lövhü

prayers.text: Subḥānaka Allāhumma Yā Ilāhī as'aluka bi-hādhā aẓ-ẓuhūri alladhī fīhi budila ad-dayjūru bil-bukūri, wa-buniya al-baytu al-maʻmūru, wa-nuzzila al-lawḥu al-masṭūru, wa-ẓahara ar-raqu al-manshūru, bi-an tunazila ʻalayya wa-man maʻī mā yuṭayyirunā ilā hawā'i ʻizzi aḥadiyyatika, wa-yu

nazzalahu ʻazza kibriyā'uhu fī ākhiri shahri aṣ-ṣiyāmi

Bismi Allāhi al-aqdami al-aqdasi

Subḥānaka Allāhumma Yā Ilāhī as'aluka billadhī aẓhärtahu wa-jaʻalta ẓuhūrahu nafsa ẓuhūrika wa-buṭūnahu nafsa baṭūnika, wa-bi-awwaliyyatihi ḥuqqiqa awwaliyyatuka wa-bi-ākhiriyyatihi thabata

prayers.text:
huwa al-ʻazīzu al-mannānu

yā ilāha ar-raḥmāni wa-al-muqtadiru ʻalā al-imkāni tarā ʻibādaka wa-ariqqā'aka alladhīna yaṣūmūna fī al-ayyāmi bi-amrika wa-irādatika wa-yaqūmūna fī al-asḥāri li-dhikrika wa-thanā'ika rajā'a mā kuniza fī kanā'izi faḍlika wa-khazā'ini jūdi wa

﴿ bismihi al-mawʻūdi fī kutubi Allāhi al-ʻalīmi al-khabīri ﴾*

qad ḥallat ayyāmu aṣ-ṣiyāmi wa-ṣāma fīhā al-ʻibādu alladhīna ṭāfū ḥawla al-ʻarshi wa-kānū min al-fāʼizīna, qul yā ilāha al-asmā'i wa-fāṭiri al-arḍi wa-as-samā'i as'aluka bi-ismika al-abhā bi-an taqbala ṣiyāma alladhīna ṣāmū fī ḥubbika wa-riḍā'ika wa-ʻamilū bimā amartahum fī zuburika wa-alwāḥika, wa-as'aluka bihim bi-an tajʻalanī mu'ayyadan ʻalā amrika wa-mustaqi

az.cat: Atəş Lövhü, Əhməd Lövhü, Müqəddəs Dənizçi lövhü

prayers.text: fa-subḥānaka Allāhumma yā ilāhī innā ṣamnā bi-amrika wa-afṭarnā bi-ḥubbika wa-riḍā'ika, fa-qbal minnā yā ilāhī mā ʻamilnā fī sabīlika khāliṣan li-wajhika wa-nāẓiran ilā amrika min dūni an anẓura ilā jihatin dunika, thumma ighfir lanā wa-li-ābā'inā wa-li-kulli man āmana bika wa-bi-āyātika al-kubrā fī hādhā aẓ-ẓuhūri al-aʻẓami al-abhā, innaka anta al-muqtadiru ʻalā mā tashā'u, wa-innaka anta al-mutaʻālī al-ʻazīzu al-mukhtāru.

Bismillāhi al-ʻazīz al-wadūd
Yā ilāhī wa-sayyidī tarānī bayna ʻuṣāh barriyyatik wa-ṭughāh khalqik, kullamā daʻawtuhum ilā baḥri ʻirfānik zādū fī inkārihim amrik wa-iʻrāḍihim ʻan afāqi irādatik, Yā Rabb asʼaluka bi-lladhīna ṣāmu fī ḥubbik wa-sharibū kawtara al-taslīmi min yadi ʻaṭāʼik bi-an tuqaddira li-aḥibbāʼik alladhīna tamassakū bi-ḥabli al-iṣṭibāri ʻinda ishrāqi shamsi imtiḥānik kulla niʻmatin aḥṣathā kutubik

Subḥānak Allāhumma yā ilāhī hadhihi ayyāmu fīhā faraḍta al-ṣiyāma ʻalā aṣfiyāʼik wa-awliyāʼik wa-ʻibādik wa-jaʻaltahu nūran li-ʼahli mamlakatik kamā jaʻalta al-ṣalāta miʻrājan lil-muwaḥḥidīna min ʻibādik, asʼaluka yā ilāhī bi-hadhayni al-rukunayn al-aʻẓamayni alladhīna jaʻaltahumā ʻizzan wa-sharafan li-khalqik bi-an taḥfaẓa dīnak min sharri kulli mushrikin wa-makri kulli fājir, Yā Rabb lā tastura nūrak alladhī aẓhartahu bi-qudratika wa-qtidirik

Hādhā duʻāʼun qad nuzzila ḥīna al-ifṭāri min ladā Allāhi al-ʻazīzi al-mukhtāri
  Huwa al-ʼāmiru 

Subḥānaka Allāhumma yā ilāhī asʼaluka bi-lladhīna jaʻalta ṣiyāmahums fī ḥubbik wa-riḍāʼik wa-iẓhāri amrik wa-ittibāʻi āyātik wa-aḥkāmik wa-ifṭārahum qurbaka wa-liqāʼak

Yā Ilāhī hādhā ʻabduka wa-bnu ʻabdika alladhī āmana bika wa-bi-āyātika wa-tawajjaha ilayka munqaṭiʻan ʻan siwāka innaka anta arḥamu ar-Rāḥimīn, asʼaluka yā Ghaffār adh-dhunūb wa-Sattār al-ʻuyūb bi-an taʻmala bihi mā yanbaghī li-samāʼi jūdi-ka wa-baḥri ifḍāli-ka wa-tadkhulahu fī jiwāri raḥmatika al-kubrā allatī sabaqat al-arḍi wa-s-samāʼi. Lā ilāha illā anta al-Ghafūr al-Karīm.

Huwa al-Muʻazzī al-Musallī al-Ghafūr ar-Raḥīm
3  Subḥānaka yā Mālik al-Wujūd wa-l-Muhaimina ʻalā al-Ghayb wa-sh-Shuhūd. Asʼaluka bi-l-lisāni alladhī minhu jarat yanābīʻu al-ḥikmati wa-l-bayāni fī al-imkāni wa-bil-qalbi alladhī jaʻaltahu makhzanāan li-ʻilmika wa-asrārika wa-kanzāan li-ḥikmatika wa-āyātika bi-an tunzila ʻalā man ṣaʻada ilayka fī kulli ḥīnin radhādha raḥmatika wa-amṭāra ʻināyatika. Innaka anta alladhī shahida bi-karamika kulli

Huwa Allāh
4  Allāhumma yā rajāʼī wa-ghāyata munāyāy. Inna waraqatan khaḍilah naḍirah rayyānah min rashḥāti saḥābi raḥmatika qad iṣfarrat fī īkati ad-dunyā wa-tamannat an tajʻalahā mukhḍarratan fī ʻālami al-baqāʼi ṭariyyah laṭīfah mudhāmmāh fī al-jannati al-ʻulyā. Rabbi, innahā kānat āyata ḥubbika bayna al-amāʼi wa-qubasah multahibah bi-ḥarārati maḥabbatika bayna an-nisāʼi. Wa-mā bariḥat tudhakkiruka bi-ṣamīmi fuʼādihā fī al-layālī.

5 Allāhumma Yā Ghāfir al-dhunūb wa-kāshif al-kurūb wa-yā `afu wa-yā ghafūr innī absṭu ilayka akuffa al-du`ā' mutaḍarri`an ilā ḥaḍrati raḥmāniyyatika an taghfira li-ummatika al-mutaṣā`idati ilā maq`adi ṣidqi raḥmatika wa-maghfiratika ay Rabb ẓallil `alayhā ghamāmi al-faḍli wa-l-iḥsāni wa-aghriqhā fī biḥāri al-`afwi wa-l-ghufrāni wa-dkhilhā fī ḥaẓīrati al-qudsi firdawsi al-jināni innaka anta al-`izzu

az.cat: Vəfat edənlər üçün namaz və dualar

prayers.text: 6 Allāhumma innī akubbu bi-wajhī `alā al-turbā' mutaḍarri`an ilā malakūtika al-a`lā an taghfira li-ummatika allatī sami`ati al-nidā' wa-labati bi-qalbi khāfiqi bi-l-walā'i wa-āmant bi-kalimatika al-`ulyā wa-ṭma'annat bi-mawāhibika allatī lā tu`addu wa-lā tuḥṣā wa-qaḍat naḥbahā fī sabīlika mushta`ilatan bi-nāri maḥabbatika allatī tat-taqidu wa-tatalẓẓā mutadhakkiratan bi-dhikrika bayna al-imā'i mushtāqatan ilā mashhadi al-kubrā

7 unājīka Yā ilāhī wa-anta al-munājī li-kulli rājī min malakūti al-asrār wa-ad`ūka an tughītha ummataka allatī sara`ati ilayka munjadhibatan bi-ḥubbika wa-hara`ati ilā `atabati raḥmāniyyatika mushta`ilatan bi-nāri maḥabbatika Rabb akrim lahā al-mathwā wa-rḥamhā fī al-nash'ati al-ukhrā wa-drik'hā bi-raḥmatika allatī lā tat-tanāhā wa-ranḥiḥā bi-ka'si maghfiratika fī `ālam al-baqā'i innaka anta al-Raḥīmi bi-l-multaji'i

prayers.text: 8 ilāhī ilāhī hādhihi ummatun min imā'iki injadhabati bi-nafḥāti qudsika wa-sh`alat bi-nāri maḥabbatika wa-stajārat bi-jiwāri raḥmatika ay Rabb aghriqhā bi-baḥri al-ghufrāni wa-dkhilhā fī ẓilli shajarati al-`afwi wa-l-iḥsāni wa-ṭahhirhā `an waḍari al-`iṣyāni innaka anta al-Karīmi al-Raḥmāni

Huwa Alláh
٩  Iláhí Iláhí inna ummataka ar-Raḥmáníyyah al-muʾminah al-mūqinah bi-kalimátika al-fardáníyyah al-mushtaʻilah bi-n-nāri al-mūqadah fī shajaratika ar-Rabbáníyyah qad rajaʻat ilayka bi-nafs muṭmaʾinnah rāḍiyah marḍiyyah Rabb adrik-hā bi-ʻafwika wa-ghufránik wa-albis-hā ḥilala faḍlik wa-iḥsánik wa-nawwir wajhahā bi-n-nūri as-sāṭiʻi fī al-firdawsi al-aʻlá wa-qarrir ʻaynahā bi-mushāhadati jamālik fī malakūtika al-abhā wa

Huwa al-Abhā
10  Iláhí wa-ghaffār dhanūbī ʾinnī atawassalu ilayka wa-ataḍarraʻu bayna yadayka wa-tashabbathu bi-dhayli ghufránika wa-abtahilu ilá malakūti ʻafwika wa-iḥsánika ʾan tashmala ʻabdaka alladhī ṣaʻada ilayka wa-wafada ʻalayka bi-laḥaẓāti aʻyuni raḥmáníyyatika wa-takhūḍa bihi fī biḥāri maghfiratika bi-sulṭāni fardáníyyatika wa-tajʻalahu mukallalan bi-aklīli aṣ-ṣafḥi bi-mawhibati rabbáníyyatika wa-munawwira al-wajhi bi-ʻafwika wa-ghufránik fī rafīqika

Huwa Alláh
11  Alláhumma yā ghāfira l-khataʾi wa-ʻāfiya dh-dhunūbi wa-l-āthāmi taghfiru man tashāʾu bi-raḥmatika l-wāsiʻati wa-raḥmáníyyatika s-sāṭiʻati ʾinnī ataḍarraʻu ilayka bi-kulli khajalin wa-ḥayāʾin mimmā ṣadara minnī l-khaṭaʾu maʻa ḏālika shfaʻ ʻindanā an taʻfuwa ʻan hāʾulāʾi wa-taghfira lahumu s-sayyiʾāti wa-tujīrahum fī jiwāri raḥmatika l-kubrá Rabb laysa lahum illā anta wa-lā yughīthuhum illā anta wa-lā yunqidhuhum illā anta Rabb

Huwa Alláh
12  Rabb wa-rajāʾī ʾinnī ataḍarraʻu ilá malakūti raḥmáníyyatika ʾan taghfira li-ʻabdika l-mutaṣāʻidi ilayka l-mutadhallili bi-bābi ʾaḥadiyyatika l-munkasiri ilá ghurrati alūhiyyatika Rabb ẓallil ʻalayhi ghamāma l-ghufrāni wa-aghriqhu fī baḥri l-ʻafwi wa-l-iḥsāni wa-ṭahhirhu min waḏari l-ʻisyāni ʾinnaka anta l-karīmu r-raḥīmu r-raḥmānu Rabb ʾinnahūstaʻraja ilá jiwāri raḥmatika wa-ṭāra ilá malakūti mawhibatika fa-akrim

huwa al-Abhá Alláh Abhá

* Lawḥu Laylati al-Baʻthi

qad naṭaqa al-Lisānu bi-aʻlā al-Bayāni wa nādati al-Kalimatu bi-aʻlā an-Nidāʼi al-Mulku Lillāhi Khāliqi as-Samāʼi waMāliki al-Asmāʼi walākinna al-ʻIbāda aktharahum mina al-Ghāfilīna qad akhadhat tarannumātu ar-Raḥmāni man fī al-Imkāni

kitābun anazalahu r-Raḥmāni min malakūti l-Bayāni wa-innahu la-rūḥu l-Ḥayawāni li-ahlil-Imkāni taʿālā Allāhu rabbul-ʿĀlamīna. yadhkuru fīhi man yadhkuru llāha rabbahu innahu la-huwa n-Nabīlu fī lawḥin ʿaẓīmin yā Muḥamm
